summary: Tested breadcrumb navigation and Invoice modal improvements. Client Detail breadcrumb (Clients > ClientName) verified working. Invoice modal client pre-selection verified working with locked client field and checkmark icon. KeyboardAvoidingView code review confirms proper implementation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Client Detail breadcrumb shows 'Clients > ClientName' with clickable Clients link, 2) Birth Plan page has 3-level breadcrumb code (Clients > ClientName > Birth Plan), 3) Invoice modal from client context shows pre-selected locked client with checkmark, 4) KeyboardAvoidingView added to Invoice/Contract/Notes modals with paddingBottom 120-140px

verified_features.invoice_keyboard_avoidance: PASS - KeyboardAvoidingView with paddingBottom 120px, Create Invoice button visible

verified_features.notes_keyboard_avoidance: PASS - Code verified: KeyboardAvoidingView with paddingBottom 140px
